seoTitle: Summerland Point vs Sun Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Summerland Point and Sun Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Summerland Point vs Sun Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Summerland Point and Sun Valley.
heading: Summerland Point vs Sun Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Summerland Point, New South Wales and Sun Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sun Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Summerland Point (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Summerland Point or Sun Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Summerland Point has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Sun Valley scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Summerland Point scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Sun Valley scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Summerland Point or Sun Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sun Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
